news: Major museum openings: LACMA, V&A East, Dataland. Art Fairs: Artexpo NY, miart Milan, Art Paris, SP-Arte, various satellite fairs. Local: Pasadena Society of Artists 101st Exhibition, Timucua Talks launch.

April art calendar update: High activity for April with key events including EXPO CHICAGO (Apr 9-12), Art Paris (Apr 9-12), and various fairs in mid-April like Dallas Art Fair and San Francisco Art Fair. Major museum expansion highlights continue to include LACMA's David Geffen Galleries and V&A East.
